verification_rule: Use redeem_test only after an actual in-game redemption. Use source_snapshot when current public sources agree on active or expired state. Do not keep source-conflict codes active when multiple current sources list them expired.

sources.name: Pocket Gamer Sailor Piece codes
sources.notes: Updated May 17, 2026. Lists 11 active codes: 700KFAVSTY through TYSMFOR400KFOLLOWONEVENT, and lists 2XLUCK, ANTIMAGICUPDATE, and CRYSTALDEFENSE as expired.

sources.name: GamesRadar Sailor Piece codes
sources.notes: May 13, 2026 update. Lists the same 11 active codes and explicit level requirements, and lists 2XLUCK, ANTIMAGICUPDATE, and CRYSTALDEFENSE as expired.

sources.name: Pro Game Guides Sailor Piece codes
sources.notes: Updated May 16, 2026. Lists the latest Huge Update codes and a wider active set; used as a conflict source, not as redeem_test evidence.

sources.name: Game.Guide Sailor Piece codes
sources.notes: Updated May 17, 2026 and claims 18 active codes. Used as a conflict source because several listed-active codes are expired in Pocket Gamer and GamesRadar.
